tasks.title: Design CloudMemoryStore interface
tasks.description: Create pkg/memory/cloud/interface.go with CloudMemoryStore interface. Must be compatible with existing Store interface in pkg/memory/store.go. Include Memory struct, SimilaritySearch, UpsertMemory, SyncToCloud, HealthCheck methods. Also create pkg/memory/cloud/noop.go as default no-op implementation.

tasks.title: Implement Supabase pgvector backend
tasks.description: Create pkg/memory/cloud/supabase.go implementing CloudMemoryStore. Use net/http (no external deps). Support pgvector similarity search via Supabase REST API. Include connection pooling, retry logic, graceful degradation on network failure.

tasks.title: Add cloud memory config
tasks.description: Extend pkg/config/config.go with CloudMemory config section: enabled (default false), backend (supabase|none), connection_string, sync_interval, max_memories. Add to ToolsConfig or new top-level section.

tasks.title: EventBus sync integration
tasks.description: Subscribe to EventKindSessionSummarize in EventBus to trigger async cloud sync. Create pkg/memory/cloud/sync.go with SyncManager that batches and debounces sync operations. Wire into agent initialization in pkg/agent/ when cloud memory enabled.

tasks.title: Implement memory_stats tool
tasks.description: Create pkg/tools/memory_stats.go - a Tool that exposes seahorse memory statistics: message count, summary count, token usage, compression ratio, session list. Query seahorse DB directly via SQL. Register in agent loop behind config flag.

tasks.title: Implement memory_health tool
tasks.description: Create pkg/tools/memory_health.go - a Tool that checks: SQLite integrity (PRAGMA integrity_check), WAL status, DB size, FTS5 index health, cloud sync status (if enabled). Register in agent loop behind config flag.

tasks.title: Write cloud memory documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/cloud-memory.md covering: architecture overview, Supabase setup guide, config reference, sync behavior, privacy considerations, troubleshooting. Also create config example file.

tasks.title: Tests + code review
tasks.description: Write tests for all new code. Static analysis. Code review for security (connection strings), concurrency (sync manager), and error handling (network failures). Fix any findings.

tasks.title: INBOX checkpoint
tasks.description: Read INBOX.md for any new user instructions mid-phase.

tasks.title: Phase R trigger
tasks.description: Trigger Phase R: audit, report, new plan generation, immediate continue.
